prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait photograph of a young East Asian woman seated on a black vintage tufted leather sofa against a dark, textured concrete wall. She wears a dramatic deep crimson red velvet halter gown with a high neck, gathered draping, side cutouts, and a long flowing skirt. Pose her in a relaxed elegant three-quarter seated position: one arm raised with her hand in her tousled dark wavy ponytail, the other hand resting softly on her lap, head slightly tilted, looking directly at the camera with a calm alluring expression. Include exactly 2 visible accessories: small pearl drop earrings and a dark bracelet or hair tie on the raised wrist. Add exactly 2 sofa details: glossy black channel-tufted leather upholstery and a shaggy brown fur cushion on the left. Use moody low-key studio lighting with soft directional light from the upper right, gentle highlights on skin and velvet folds, deep shadows, subtle haze, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, and a refined fashion editorial mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, waist-to-knee framing with the red fabric cascading across the lower foreground, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical portrait photograph of a young East Asian woman seated on a black vintage tufted leather sofa against a dark, textured concrete wall. She wears a dramatic deep crimson red velvet halter gown with a high neck, gathered draping, side cutouts, and a long flowing skirt. Pose her in a relaxed elegant three-quarter seated position: one arm raised with her hand in her tousled dark wavy ponytail, the other hand resting softly on her lap, head slightly tilted, looking directly at the camera with a calm alluring expression. Include exactly 2 visible accessories: small pearl drop earrings and a dark bracelet or hair tie on the raised wrist. Add exactly 2 sofa details: glossy black channel-tufted leather upholstery and a shaggy brown fur cushion on the left. Use moody low-key studio lighting with soft directional light from the upper right, gentle highlights on skin and velvet folds, deep shadows, subtle haze, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, and a refined fashion editorial mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, waist-to-knee framing with the red fabric cascading across the lower foreground, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感竖版肖像摄影作品，主角为一位 年轻东亚女性，她坐在一张黑色复古簇绒皮沙发上，背景是深色纹理混凝土墙。她身着一件引人注目的 深绯红色丝绒挂脖礼服，高领设计，带有褶皱垂坠感、侧面镂空以及长款飘逸裙摆。让她保持放松而优雅的四分之三侧坐姿势：一只手臂抬起，手放在凌乱的深色波浪马尾辫上，另一只手轻柔地放在膝盖上，头部微倾，直视镜头，表情冷静而迷人。包含恰好 2 个可见配饰：小巧的珍珠耳坠，以及抬起的手腕上戴着深色手环或发圈。添加恰好 2 个沙发细节：光泽感的黑色长条簇绒皮革软包，以及左侧的一个蓬松棕色毛绒靠垫。使用深沉的低调摄影棚布光，从右上角投射柔和的定向光，在皮肤和丝绒褶皱上形成柔和的高光，阴影深邃，带有微妙的雾感，真实的皮肤纹理，浅景深，营造出精致的时尚杂志大片氛围。竖版 9:16 构图，腰部至膝盖的取景，红色面料在下方前景处倾泻而下，无文字，无水印。
